evidence: type=1, effect_param[1]=1500 BPS; type=1_no_buff before mapping
type=1, effect_param[1]=3000 BPS = 30% max-HP heal (mirror shape of 1005015); appears on 休息回复 and similar non-attack heals
type=1, effect_param[0]=10000 BPS = 100% damage→HP drain
type=3, effect_param[0]=1 energy
type=1 cast=6 target=self; pak effect_param[0]=1 is the hit delta. editor_name '10' is the variant index, not the count
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +2 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +3 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +4 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +5 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +6 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +7 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +8 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +9 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +10 hits
type=3, effect_param[0]=3 turns lock on actor's own skill slot; attached to defensive skills

type=1; pak emits two rows (target=self and target=enemy). op_dispel_marks reads ROW_TARGET only — all args are ignored. Acts as the dispel half of 焚烧烙印; per-side tally fed into ctx.marks_dispelled for the 1042014 row that follows.

type=1 cast=12 (TURN_END). op_dispel_marks_to_burn reads ROW_ARG0 as per-mark burn multiplier (ctx.burn_stacks += ctx.marks_dispelled * arg0). arg0=5 = 5 burn stacks per dispelled mark, sourced from pak effect_param[2] which lists 5 burn entries.
type=3, same as 1037001; pak uses different group IDs that the kernel does not distinguish
type=1 cast=12; +1 priority for the actor next turn

type=1 cast=11 target=self; pak effect_param=[1,1,1,100] would double every active buff's magnitude on the actor (生日蛋糕). Kernel does not currently model per-buff amplitude amplification — buffs are stored as scalar (stat_delta_bps, stack_count) without a separate amount channel that 'double' would multiply. Routed to noop pending a 'buff-amount-multiplier' state field on KernelState.SideState.

pak_editor_name: 天光-本技能系别和天气系别相同
evidence: Buff_id (not effect_conf id) referenced by 天光 (skill 7060220) with cast_moment=24. base_ids=[2040042..2040047] = prefix 2040 family for 'skill element morphs to weather element'. Kernel computes damage with skill.element pre-bound; dynamic re-binding from current weather is not yet modeled. Routed to noop until a per-attack element-override channel exists.
type=1 effect_param=[2,500,0,50,0]; mirrors 1005015 shape — param[1]=500 BPS = 5% max-HP heal. param[3]=50 energy-scaled secondary channel ignored by op_heal_hp (only ROW_ARG0 read).
type=1 effect_param=[2,2000,0,200,0]; param[1]=2000 BPS = 20% max-HP heal (mirror of 1005015 shape).
type=1 effect_param=[2,2500,0,250,0]; param[1]=2500 BPS = 25% max-HP heal.
type=1 effect_param=[2,6000,0,600,0]; param[1]=6000 BPS = 60% max-HP heal.
type=1 effect_param=[5000,0]; mirrors 1011001 shape — param[0]=5000 BPS = 50% damage→HP drain.
type=1 effect_param=[10000,0]; bug-element variant of 1011001 — same 100% drain shape.
type=3 effect_param=[2,0,0]; mirrors 1019001 — param[0]=2 energy gained.
type=3 effect_param=[3,0,0]; param[0]=3 energy gained. target_type varies (1 self / 5 team) — op_heal_energy only adds to ctx.heal_energy; row's ROW_TARGET drives dispatch.
type=3 effect_param=[4,0,0]; +4 energy.
type=3 effect_param=[5,0,0]; +5 energy.
type=3 effect_param=[10,0,0]; +10 energy.
type=1 effect_param=[1,2,99,99,0] — generic debuff cleanse on target (rows propagate target via ROW_TARGET). Equivalent to 净化debuff; op_dispel_debuffs reads ROW_TARGET only.
type=3 effect_param=[1]; swaps HP% with opponent. op_exchange_hp_ratio takes no args (sets ctx.exchange_hp_ratio=1).
type=3 effect_param=[3] target=enemy; swaps active mods/buffs with opponent (天理之眼). op_transfer_mods sets ctx.swap_mods=1 without args.
type=3 effect_param=[1]; swap move sets with enemy (盗术). op_exchange_moves sets ctx.swap_moves=1 without args.
type=1 effect_param=[0,1,0,0,99,1,1] target_type=4 (enemy buffs as source). Copies enemy's active positive buffs onto self. op_mirror_enemy_buffs sets ctx.mirror_enemy_buffs=1 without args.

type=1 compound (5 buff candidates incl. 2088001 蓄力, 2003004-32 免疫吹飞, 2056004 聚能变为蓄力, 2015008 阿布释放次数, 2032007 能耗-1). Would dispel only the specific buff_base_ids listed, not all enemy buffs — kernel lacks selective-buff dispel by base_id. H_DISPEL_BUFFS is too broad; route to noop until a 'dispel buffs matching base_id mask' channel exists.

type=1 compound effect_param[0]=[20070010,20070011,20070012] (3 poison stacks) + [1]=[20010020]*3 (魔攻+10 ×3 stacks) — applies poison-on-enemy AND magic-atk-buff-on-self in one row. Kernel rows are single-handler; representing this needs either a 'compound row' or splitting into two rows at codegen time. Route to noop until codegen learns to emit multiple rows for compound type=1.

type=1 compound effect_param[0]=[20070010-12] (3 poison stacks on enemy) + [1]=[20010030*3, 20010040*3] (物攻-10 + 魔攻-10 dual debuff). Same compound-row problem as 1053002 — needs multi-row codegen emission.

type=1 effect_param=[-1,1,7130160] — self-references skill 7130160. Not the standard 1032xxx +hit-count shape (slot 0=-1 not a positive delta). Likely a 'remove a charge of self skill 7130160' or 'mark skill as used' mechanic; semantics unverified. Route to noop until skill-state mutation channel exists.

type=1 effect_param=[0,2]; per editor_name '释放其他迅捷技能' = 'cast other priority skills' — triggers a chained cast of every priority-tagged skill in the actor's set. Kernel does not yet model recursive/follow-up skill execution. Route to noop until a 'queued follow-up skill cast' channel exists.

type=3 effect_param=[5000,1032003,299903,1032005,299903] — 50% chance roll selecting between effect_ids 1032003 (连击3) and 1032005 (连击5) with timer 299903. Random branching of effect_ids isn't representable as a single row; needs a 'roll-and-dispatch' codegen primitive. Route to noop.

type=3 effect_param=[5000, [20010030]*5+[20010040]*5, 299903, 0, 0] — 50% to apply heavy stacked 物攻-10 + 魔攻-10 (5 stacks each) to enemy. Effect is type=3 state-change, the 50% probability is in pak effect_param not in row success_rate. Route to noop until type=3 probabilistic debuff emission is wired.

type=3 effect_param=[0, 7150091] — references skill 7150091 (the 疾风刺 follow-up). Likely 'cast linked skill after this resolves'. Kernel does not yet chain skill execution. Route to noop until a 'chained-skill' channel exists.

type=3 effect_param=[0] on skill 200170 (盲拧 ability). Semantics unclear from pak alone — single zero arg suggests a flag-only state. Route to noop pending Roco wiki cross-check; ability is observable so kernel can't silently drop it.

type=3, 20-slot effect_param packing per-element buff_ids (普通/萌/武/龙/草/光/翼/水/幽/恶/冰/火/毒/电/地/虫/机械/幻) plus mark 1016017. Encodes the 咕噜球 (skill 200137) element-roulette: random element each use applies a different buff. Route to noop — needs an RNG-driven element-buff dispatch table.
type=3 effect_param=None; ability 200233 inherits stats/buffs from dead allies on entry. Needs a 'dead-allies state' input + entry-time buff materialisation channel. Route to noop.
type=3 effect_param=[20070010,1] — converts enemy 中毒 stacks of buff_id 20070010 into 寄生 (parasite). Kernel does not yet model parasite or status-type conversion.
type=3 effect_param=[20070011,1] — sibling of 1076001 targeting buff_id 20070011.
type=3 effect_param=[20070012,1] — sibling of 1076001 targeting buff_id 20070012.
type=3 effect_param=[20070020,1] — converts 烧伤 (burn) into 寄生. Same parasite-state gap as 1076001-003.

pak_editor_name: 自身1魔力出场时全属性提高
evidence: type=3 effect_param=[0,1,1,20011531]; conditional entry buff predicated on self having exactly 1 energy. Kernel entry-buff channels don't yet expose actor's current-energy threshold gate; conditional shape would also need 5-stat packed buff (20011531 = 物攻/魔攻 ×5 stacks).

pak_editor_name: 敌方1魔力出场时全属性提高
evidence: type=3 effect_param=[0,1,2,20011532]; sibling of 1077001 but predicated on opponent's energy. Same gate + packed-buff gap.
type=3 effect_param=[3,0]; 'energy cost does not change' — flag suppressing other cost-mod effects on skill 7080340. Route to noop pending a 'cost-immutable' channel.

pak_editor_name: 给予场下恢复效果动效
evidence: type=3 effect_param=[1001]; editor_name literally says 'give off-field heal effect animation'. Visual-only — no kernel state should change.
type=3 effect_param=None; ability 镶嵌 (Inlay) on skill 7070160. Param-less marker effect — semantics likely tied to a downstream check the kernel does not yet model.

type=3 effect_param=[2]; 'usable while charging' — overrides the 蓄力 lockout so the actor can still cast skill 7100250/7100251 mid-charge. Kernel's charge state does not yet expose a per-skill exemption.
type=3 10-slot effect_param mapping bug-element side-condition to a roulette of buff_ids 20172450-490 (奉献威力/连击/中毒/能耗/吸血). Skill 7130200. Same RNG-driven element-buff dispatch gap as 1070001.

pak_editor_name: 背包中每有1个虫系，进入战斗后自身全属性提升10%
evidence: type=3 effect_param=[13,0,0,20010016,299901]; bag-side-count gated entry buff (per-bug-in-bag stat boost). Kernel side-skill counter tracks active team only — no bag/inventory channel.

pak_editor_name: 登场时，友军死亡的精灵越多，强化越多，每只增加20%双攻
evidence: type=3 effect_param=[0,2,0,[20011541]*3,299901]; scales entry buff with count of dead allies (双攻 +20% per fallen ally). Needs a 'dead-allies-count' gate the kernel does not yet expose.
type=3 effect_param=[13,0,0,20230460,299901]; conditional entry debuff (10-stack 物攻/魔攻 packed). 13 in slot 0 suggests bag/condition code matching 1022004 — same bag-side-count gating gap.

pak_editor_name: 己方其他精灵每使用1次水系技能，入场时技能消耗-1
evidence: type=3 effect_param=[5,0,0,1,20320225,299901,-1,0]; 'per water skill used by other allies, -1 entry cost'. Needs 'allies' use-count gate, distinct from the ally use-count we already wire on H_SKILL_COST_REDUCTION_TYPE.

type=3 effect_param=[0,0,0,1,[20230480,20230480],299901,-1,1]; entry passive applying buff 20230480 (水和武属性攻击提升20%) conditionally. Multi-element conditional buff isn't wired; needs an element-condition gate.

type=3 effect_param=[4,0,0,1,20230446,299901,-1,0]; ability 200153 entry passive applying 伤害威力增加10 buff. Generic ability-passive entry-buff channel not yet wired for the 1034xxx family (slot 0 carries the condition code, kernel has no such switch).
type=3 effect_param=[0,0,3,1,20230570,299901,-1,0]; ability 200172 conditional entry buff (地系/钢系威力+%). Same 1034xxx gap as 1034016.
type=3 effect_param=[0,0,2,1,20230790,299901,-1,0]; ability 200181 entry buff (萌系威力+10). Same 1034xxx family gap.
type=3 effect_param=[21,0,0,2,20011524,299901,-1,0]; conditional entry buff with packed 魔攻+10×2 stacks. 1034xxx family ability-passive gap.
type=3 effect_param=[0,0,0,2,20011524,299901,-1,3]; sibling of 1034019 with different condition flag.
type=3 effect_param=[14,0,0,1,20010012,299901,-1,0]; ability 200212 渗透 conditional entry buff (迪莫-物攻/魔攻/物防/魔防 +5 packed). 1034xxx ability-passive gap.
type=3 effect_param=[8,0,0,1,20010012,299901,-1,0]; sibling of 1034021 with condition code 8 instead of 14.

pak_editor_name: 每次进入战斗，物理和魔法攻击增加20%
evidence: type=3 effect_param=[20011010,299901]; entry buff applying packed 物攻/魔攻+10 twice. Pure entry buff would be expressible by emitting two H_PERMANENT_MOD rows, but the codegen pipeline does not yet auto-expand packed-stat buffs from a 1061xxx state-change. Route to noop pending packed-buff codegen.
type=3 effect_param=[12,0,0,0,20350350,299901]; ability 200111 entry-applies 溶解扩散 (corrosion spread) buff. Same 1064xxx state-change gap as siblings.
type=3 effect_param=[9,0,0,0,20230571,299901]; ability 200120 entry buff (地系威力+%). Same 1064xxx gap.

pak_editor_name: 每携带一个水系技能，地系技能能耗-1
evidence: type=3 effect_param=[5,0,0,0,20320420,299901]; per-water-skill carried, ground-element skills cost -1. Needs an element-conditional cost-reduce-by-element-count gate — kernel has H_ENTRY_BUFF_PER_SKILL_COUNT for cost but indexed by the actor's element, not the carried-skill element vs target-skill-element combo here.

Direct buff_id reference. base_id=2003016 (电咩咩免疫) — single-pet status-immunity flag (electric immunity for 电咩咩 line). Prefix 2003 = 'immunity buffs', mapped to H_NOOP in prefix_handler_map because kernel does not yet model per-status-type immunity gates. Override here so the gap is not counted against the prefix bucket.
Direct buff_id reference. base_id=2003033 (免疫积蓄) — immunity to charge/accumulate. Same prefix-2003 immunity gap.

pak_editor_name: 每有一层萌化，获得技能能耗-1
evidence: Direct buff_id reference. base_id=2040013; per-cute-stack cost reduction. Kernel models cute stacks (ctx.cute) but no 'cost-1 per stack' channel — H_CUTE_ON_GAIN_COST_REDUCE only fires on-gain. Prefix 2040 family is generally cute/lunar morph mechanics with no kernel ops.
Direct buff_id reference. base_id=2040021; on-gain-charge cost reduction of 5. Needs an event-driven 'on-gain-charge → cost-delta' channel that the kernel does not yet expose.
Direct buff_id reference. base_id=2040038; the 击鼓传花 pass-the-parcel mechanic (status passes to next actor at turn end). Needs cross-actor state transfer at turn boundary — not modeled.
Direct buff_id reference. base_ids=[2040039, 2040040] (月光合奏); two-actor ensemble mechanic that buffs both 月光 pets when both are on field. Needs partner-presence detection across actors.
Direct buff_id reference. base_id=2040041; editor_name '飘字用' = 'for floating text' — visual-only marker on 月牙雪熊. No kernel state change required.
Direct buff_id reference. base_id=2040069 (龙威 / Dragon Aura). Pressure-style passive that intimidates opposing dragons — needs cross-actor element-aware state inspection not yet in kernel.
